options.name: --all
options.description: Delete ALL burner projects

options.name: --days
options.description: Delete projects older than specified days

options.name: --force
options.description: Skip confirmation prompt

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Interactive mode: select projects to delete

options.name: --auto-clean-days
options.description: Set auto-cleanup age in days (0 to disable)

options.name: --editor
options.description:
Set the default editor command (e.g., code, cursor, 
rider)

options.name: --home
options.description: Set the burner home directory

options.name: --open-home
options.description: Open the burner home directory in file explorer

options.name: --open-templates
options.description: Open the templates directory in file explorer

options.name: --path
options.description: Show config file path

options.name: --show
options.description: Show current configuration

options.name: --templates
options.description: Set the burner templates directory

commands.name: import

options.name: --copy
options.description: Copy the folder instead of moving it

options.name: --force
options.description: Skip confirmation prompt when moving

options.name: --name
options.description:
Custom name for the imported project (defaults to 
current folder name)

commands.description: Import current folder as a burner project

options.name: --all
options.description: Show all details

options.name: --code
options.description:
Open in editor after creation (uses configured 
editor)

options.name: --directory
options.description: Target directory (uses default if not specified)

options.name: --explorer
options.description: Open in file explorer after creation

options.name: --interactive
options.description:
Run template interactively (for templates requiring 
user input)

arguments.name: TEMPLATE
arguments.description:
Template to use (dotnet, web, or custom). Shows 
available templates if not provided.

options.name: --code
options.description: Open in editor (uses configured editor)

options.name: --explorer
options.description: Open in file explorer instead of terminal

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Interactive mode: select project from list

arguments.name: NAME

Project name to open (optional, interactive if not 
provided)

commands.name: version
commands.description: Show version and info about Burner
